sections.title: Projects
sections.body: A growing collection of active and in-progress projects focused on systems, tools, data organization, and related development work.

items.title: Game Stats
description: A structured repository for storing and organizing game-related data such as mobs, titles, items, and other records.
Designed to make game data easier to manage, expand, and reference across connected systems.
about: An in-progress data repository for organizing core game records and related information.
